title: conyza linifolia
intro: Conyza linifolia, also known as flaxleaf fleabane, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Conyza linifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support respiratory health. Conyza linifolia can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
